item.title: ⚖️ Litigation · Lost · ENTA
item.ns0:headline: Lost patent appeal; Federal Circuit affirms invalidity of '953 patent
item.description:
Lost patent appeal; Federal Circuit affirms invalidity of '953 patent

Lost its appeal at the Federal Circuit, which affirmed the district court's summary judgment that U.S. Patent No. 11,358,953 is invalid. The patent was asserted against Pfizer's COVID-19 antiviral Paxlovid. The ruling eliminates potential damages or licensing revenue from Pfizer.

About: Enanta Pharmaceuticals, Inc., a biotechnology company, discovers and develops small molecule drugs for virology and immunology indications. The company’s product pipeline comprises EDP-514, which is in phase 1b clinical development for the treatment of chronic infection with hepatitis B virus or HBV; zelicapavir and EDP-323, which is in phase II clinical development for the treatment of respiratory syncytial virus; EDP-235, which is in phase II clinical development for the treatment of human cor…

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · PAYO
item.ns0:headline: Acquired by Nuvei for $7.40 cash per share (~$2.75B); close mid-2027
item.description:
Acquired by Nuvei for $7.40 cash per share (~$2.75B); close mid-2027

Entered into a definitive agreement to be acquired by Nuvei for $7.40 per share in cash, valuing the company at approximately $2.75 billion. The price represents a 44% premium to Payoneer's unaffected closing price on June 8, 2026. The transaction is expected to close in mid-2027, subject to shareholder approval and regulatory clearances.

About: Payoneer Global Inc. operates as a financial technology company. The company offers customers with a multi-currency account to serve their cross-border accounts receivable and accounts payable needs through payment infrastructure platform. It delivers a suite of services, such as funds management, working capital, multicurrency accounts, and workforce management. It also provides various payment options with minimal integration required, full back-office functions, and customer support.

  • Counterparty: Nuvei
  • Offer price: $7.40
  • Deal value: $2.75 billion
  • Premium: 44%
  • Consideration: cash
  • Announced: 2026-06-23
  • Expected Close: mid-2027

The company was formerly known as CannaGrow Holdings, Inc. and changed its name to Xtreme One Entertainment, Inc. in December 2023. Xtreme One Entertainment, Inc. was incorporated in 1995 and is based in Grand Rapids, Michigan.

item.ns0:headline: Acquired by Berkshire Hathaway for $72.50 cash; vote July 22
item.description:
Acquired by Berkshire Hathaway for $72.50 cash; vote July 22

Will be acquired by Berkshire Hathaway Inc. for $72.50 per share in cash, representing a 24% premium over the May 29 closing price and a 21% premium over the 30-day VWAP. The merger has been unanimously approved by TMHC's board and is subject to stockholder approval at a special meeting on July 22, 2026. Upon completion, TMHC will become a wholly owned subsidiary of Berkshire Hathaway.

About: Taylor Morrison Home Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a homebuilder and land developer in the United States. It designs, builds, and sells single, and multifamily detached and attached homes in markets for entry-level, move-up, and resort lifestyle buyers under the Taylor Morrison and Esplanade brand names; and develops lifestyle and master-planned communities with single, and multi-family detached and attached homes.

item.ns0:headline: Acquired by Cambridge for $17.25 cash; vote Aug 27
item.description:
Acquired by Cambridge for $17.25 cash; vote Aug 27

Shareholders will vote on a merger with Cambridge Financial Group at a special meeting on August 27, 2026. Under the definitive agreement, each share of FSEA common stock will be converted into the right to receive $17.25 in cash, representing a ~47% premium over the $11.74 closing price on May 4, 2026. The board unanimously recommends approval; insiders holding ~6.6% of shares have agreed to vote in favor.

About: First Seacoast Bancorp, Inc. operates as the holding company for First Seacoast Bank that provides banking and wealth management services for individuals and businesses. The company offers interest-bearing and non-interest-bearing checking, savings, and money market accounts, as well as time deposits.

item.description:
Acquired by Equinox Gold; shareholder vote July 22

Is being acquired by Equinox Gold Corp. pursuant to a court-approved plan of arrangement under the Canada Business Corporations Act. A special meeting of shareholders is scheduled for July 22, 2026 to vote on the arrangement resolution, which requires approval by at least 66 2/3% of votes cast. The arrangement agreement was signed on May 12, 2026.

About: Orla Mining Ltd. acquires, explores, develops, and exploits mineral properties. It explores gold, silver, zinc, lead, and copper deposits. The company owns 100% interests in the Camino Rojo project that consists of seven concessions covering an area of 138,636 hectares located in Zacatecas, Mexico; Cerro Quema project totaling an area of 15,000 hectares located in the Azuero Peninsula, Panama; and the South Railroad project consisting of an area of 21,000 hectares located in Elko, Nevada.

item.ns0:headline: Sells Federation Gold Royalty for A$8M cash; 16x ROI in <4 months
item.description:
Sells Federation Gold Royalty for A$8M cash; 16x ROI in <4 months

Completed the sale of a capped 4.5% gold royalty on the Hera project in New South Wales, Australia, for total cash consideration of A$8,000,000. The royalty was acquired in February 2026, yielding a 16x return on invested capital over a holding period of less than four months. The transaction closed on June 23, 2026, and proceeds are expected to be reinvested into the company's acquisition pipeline.

About: Vox Royalty Corp. operates as a mining royalty company. The company holds a portfolio of 70 precious metals royalties in Australia, Canada, the United States of America, South Africa, Brazil, and Peru. The company was founded in 2014 and is based in Westminster, Colorado.

The dissident slate includes José Maurício Pereira Coelho and Ieda Gomes Yell for board seats, with Manuel Lino Silva de Sousa Oliveira and Marcelo Gasparino da Silva nominated for chairman. The meeting will be held virtually via the TEN platform.

The company operates in two segments, Iron Ore Solutions and Vale Base Metals. It extracts, produces, and distributes iron ore, iron ore pellets, briquettes, nickel, copper, other ferrous products, and by-products, including gold, silver, cobalt, platinum-group metals, and other base metals, as well as low-carbon critical minerals.

Urges board to explore sale or asset monetization to close NAV discount

Jorey Chernett, a 7.19% shareholder, delivered a letter to SEACOR Marine's board urging exploration of strategic alternatives, including an outright sale or structured asset monetization, to address the significant discount between the current stock price and the estimated net asset value of its fleet. The filing converts from Schedule 13G to 13D, signaling activist intent. No specific timeline or formal process has been announced.

About: SEACOR Marine Holdings Inc. provides marine and support transportation services to offshore energy facilities worldwide. The company engages in the operation and management of a fleet of offshore support vessels that deliver cargo and personnel to offshore installations, including offshore wind farms; assisting in offshore operations for production and storage facilities; and carrying and launching of equipment used underwater in drilling and well installation, maintenance, inspection and repair…

item.description:
Sells Ceiba/Okume assets to Panoro for $127M cash + $39.5M earnout

Completed the sale of its 40.375% participating interests in the Ceiba Field and Okume Complex (Block G, Equatorial Guinea) to a subsidiary of Panoro Energy ASA for upfront cash consideration of approximately $127 million, after closing adjustments. The company is also entitled to future contingent consideration of up to $39.5 million, comprising $12.5 million linked to Ceiba production performance and $9.0 million payable in each of 2027, 2028 and 2029 subject to production and oil price thresholds. The transaction closed on June 16, 2026, and the company filed pro forma financial statements reflecting the disposition.

About: Kosmos Energy Ltd., a deepwater exploration and production company, engages in the exploration, development, and production of oil and natural gas properties. It has oil and gas production projects in offshore Ghana, Equatorial Guinea, Mauritania, Senegal, and the Gulf of America. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Dallas, Texas.

item.description:

Announced FDA approval of Utebzi (tebipenem pivoxil) for complicated urinary tract infections in adults with limited oral options. This is the first oral carbapenem antibiotic approved in the US, based on the PIVOT-PO trial showing non-inferiority to IV treatment. The drug was developed under GSK's exclusive license and is expected to be available by end of 2026.

Mackay Gold & Silver Corp. acquires 100% of Comstock Inc.'s Nevada mining assets (Silver City Lode properties) for US$20M cash and 2M common shares at closing, plus US$7M payable within 18 months in cash/shares. item.title: ⚖️ Litigation · Lost · BIOX
item.ns0:headline: Lost partial summary judgment on liability in noteholder dispute; damages pending
item.description:
Lost partial summary judgment on liability in noteholder dispute; damages pending

The Supreme Court of New York granted plaintiffs' motion for partial summary judgment on liability, finding that multiple Events of Default occurred and that Bioceres and its guarantors are liable under the Note Purchase Agreements. Damages, default interest, contractual premiums, and the commercial reasonableness of the January 2026 foreclosure auction remain to be determined. The company continues to contest the allegations and intends to defend vigorously, while also advancing a strategic review of continuing operations and liability management initiatives.

About: Bioceres Crop Solutions Corp., together with its subsidiaries, develops and commercializes crop productivity solutions. It operates through Seed and Integrated Products, Crop Protection, and Crop Nutrition segments. The Seed and Integrated Products segment provides seed traits, germplasms, and seed treatment packs for healthier and higher yielding crops. The Crop Protection segment develops, produces, and markets Rizoderma, adjuvants, therapies, herbicides, insecticides, fungicides, and baits.

  • Counterparty: Jasper Lake Ventures One LLC et al.
  • Announced: 2026-06-16

item.description:
Spins off retail business via deconsolidation; now pure-play medical cannabis

Completed deconsolidation of its wholly owned retail subsidiary, Glass House Retail LLC, effective June 12, 2026, separating the dual-use cannabis business from its medical cannabis operations. The company's remaining operations consist solely of medical marijuana facilities licensed by California and the DEA. Pro forma financials reflect the removal of retail contributions. The company highlights an upcoming rescheduling hearing for recreational cannabis on June 29, 2026, which could further boost its medical cannabis focus and tax benefits from Schedule III status.

About: Glass House Brands Inc., together with its subsidiaries, operates as an integrated cannabis company in the United States. It operates through three segments: Retail; Wholesale Biomass; and Cannabis-Related Consumer Packaged Goods. The Retail segment owns, and operates retail cannabis stores, and dispensary operation management services. The Wholesale Biomass segment includes propagation, nursery, flowering canopy, dries, processes, and distributes cannabis biomass.

item.description:
Secures €317.5M Tether credit facility; issues 46.7M pre-funded warrants at $0.0001

Rumble (now RUM Group Inc.) completed its acquisition of Northern Data AG and entered into a €317.5M secured credit facility with Tether. The facility matures in 5 years, bears interest at 3% + EURIBOR, and includes a one-time conversion right for Tether after 1 year at the greater of 10-day VWAP or $7.88 per Rumble share. Tether also received a pre-funded warrant for 46,719,910 Rumble shares at $0.0001 per share as consideration for transferring 50% of its receivable from Northern Data. The company changed its legal name to RUM Group Inc. effective June 18, 2026.

About: Rumble Inc. provides video sharing and cloud services platform in the United States, Canada, and internationally. The company offers Rumble Video, a free and subscription-based video sharing platform; Rumble Studio, a multi-platform livestreaming and monetization service for creators; Rumble Advertising Center, an in-house advertising marketplace; and Rumble Wallet, a non-custodial crypto wallet integrated directly into the Rumble platform enabling audiences to tip creators natively in crypto.

  • Deal value: €317,533,400.90
  • Announced: 2026-06-18

Entered into a settlement agreement to pay $30 million to resolve End-User Class claims in the consolidated PVC Pipe Antitrust Litigation. The settlement is subject to preliminary and final court approval; payment is due approximately 21 days after preliminary approval. The company does not admit wrongdoing and expects to fund the payment from available cash, with no material adverse effect on financial position.

item.title: 📤 Divestiture · Related Party · IMCC
item.ns0:headline: Sells European operations to CEO's entity for CAD$10.5M debt assumption
item.description:
Sells European operations to CEO's entity for CAD$10.5M debt assumption

Entered a non-binding letter of intent to sell its European-focused assets (via IMC Holdings) to Slil.com Holding Ltd., a company beneficially owned by CEO Oren Shuster. Slil will assume approximately CAD$10.5M of debt (CAD$7.5M retained liabilities + CAD$3M short-term liabilities), significantly reducing IMC's debt burden. The company will retain its Israeli operations and focus on that market. The transaction is subject to negotiation of a definitive agreement, approval by a special committee of independent directors, and regulatory clearances. The company intends to rely on financial hardship exemptions from formal valuation and minority shareholder requirements under MI 61-101.

About: IM Cannabis Corp. engages in importation, distribution and sale of medical cannabis products in Israel and Germany. It provides medical cannabis dried flowers; and full-spectrum cannabis extracts under the IMC, BLKMT, and LOT420 brands. The company serves medical patients. IM Cannabis Corp. was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.

  • Counterparty: Slil.com Holding Ltd.
  • Deal value: CAD$10,500,000
  • Consideration: cash
  • Announced: 2026-06-18

item.ns0:headline: Receives increased unsolicited bid from Diana at $27.34/sh (53% premium)
item.description:
Receives increased unsolicited bid from Diana at $27.34/sh (53% premium)

Receives a revised unsolicited offer from Diana Shipping Inc. (NYSE: DSX) to acquire all outstanding shares not already owned by Diana for $27.34 per share, consisting of $24.80 in cash plus one Diana share valued at $2.54. The offer represents a 53% premium to Genco's undisturbed price and a 16% premium to its June 16 close. Diana has requested that Genco delay its June 18 annual meeting to allow the board and shareholders to evaluate the proposal; the cash component is fully financed with $1.433 billion in committed bank financing.

About: Genco Shipping & Trading Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the ocean transportation of drybulk cargoes worldwide. It operates through two segments: major bulk and minor bulk fleet. The company owns and operates dry bulk vessels to transports iron ore, grains, coal, steel products, and other drybulk cargoes. It charters its vessels primarily to trading houses, including commodities traders; producers; and government-owned entities.

  • Counterparty: Diana Shipping Inc. (DSX)
  • Offer price: $27.34 per share
  • Premium: 53%
  • Consideration: cash+stock
  • Announced: 2026-06-17

item.ns0:headline: FDA agrees Phase I/II data can support accelerated approval BLA for AMT-130; submission Q3 2026
item.description:
FDA agrees Phase I/II data can support accelerated approval BLA for AMT-130; submission Q3 2026

Announced that the FDA communicated during a Type B meeting that the 3-year analysis from the Phase I/II study of AMT-130 in Huntington's disease is acceptable as the primary basis of a Biologics License Application (BLA) for accelerated approval. The company intends to submit the BLA in the third quarter of 2026 and will align with FDA on the confirmatory study design prior to submission. The FDA committed to work expeditiously on alignment.

The company offers HEMGENIX that allows people living with hemophilia B to produce factor IX, which can lower the risk of bleeding. Its lead product candidate is AMT-130, a gene therapy candidate, which is in phase I/II clinical study for the treatment of Huntington’s disease.

item.description:

Sold a 27% non-controlling equity interest in its midstream subsidiary Pinnacle Gas Services to Sixth Street for $600 million, implying a $2.2 billion enterprise value for Pinnacle. Comstock retains a 73% controlling stake and will continue to operate Pinnacle under a management services agreement.

The company was incorporated in 1919 and is headquartered in Frisco, Texas.

item.description:
Acquires Grand River Commerce; $5.72 cash or 0.1415 ISBA shares per share

Entered into a definitive merger agreement to acquire Grand River Commerce, Inc. for a mix of cash and stock. Grand River shareholders can elect $5.72 per share in cash or 0.1415 shares of Isabella common stock per share, subject to proration (35% cash, 65% stock). The total cash consideration is $18.3 million, and Isabella will issue approximately 839,003 shares. The transaction is subject to regulatory approvals, Nasdaq listing, and Grand River shareholder approval.

About: Isabella Bank Corporation operates as the bank holding company for Isabella Bank that provides banking and wealth management services to businesses, institutions, and individuals and their families in Michigan, the United States. The company offers deposit products, including checking and savings accounts; and certificates of deposit, direct deposits, and cash management services.

item.ns0:headline: Issues $287.5M 4.75% converts due 2032; conversion price ~$11.08
item.description:
Issues $287.5M 4.75% converts due 2032; conversion price ~$11.08

Issued $287.5M aggregate principal amount of 4.75% convertible senior notes due 2032 in an underwritten offering via Morgan Stanley. Net proceeds were ~$278.3M after discounts and expenses. Notes mature July 2032, initially convertible at $11.08/share (35% premium above offering price); redemption possible from July 2029 with stock price triggers, and holders may require repurchase in 2030 or upon a fundamental change. The offering closed June 15, 2026.

About: PureCycle Technologies, Inc. engages in the production of recycled polypropylene (PP) in Thailand. The company holds a license for restoring waste PP into ultra-pure recycled PP resin, PureFive, which has various applications, including packaging and labeling for consumer products, textiles, and plastic parts for various industries. Its recycling process separates color, odor, other plastics, and additives through a physical separation process.

item.ns0:headline: Nominates full director slate at Braemar; accuses board of $480M self-dealing
item.description:
Nominates full director slate at Braemar; accuses board of $480M self-dealing

Al Shams Investments, Braemar's largest shareholder, sent an open letter to the board accusing it of authorizing a hotel sale that triggered a $480M termination fee to a company controlled by Chair Monty Bennett. Al Shams intends to nominate a full slate of independent directors for the 2026 Annual Meeting and pursue legal remedies against the board and Bennett. The activist has escalated since May 2026; BHR stock fell 15% following the disclosure.

About: Braemar Hotels & Resorts Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on the high-growth luxury hotel and resort sector. The Company targets high-performance luxury urban and resort properties, specializing in assets that generate revenue per available room (RevPAR) at least twice the U.S. national average. Its industry-leading portfolio features luxury properties across the United States and the U.S. territories in the Caribbean.

  • Consideration: empty
  • Announced: 2026-06-15

item.description:

Subsidiary Obagi Medical received FDA approval for Obagi® saypha® ChIQ™ injectable hyaluronic acid gel, indicated for cheek augmentation and midface contour correction in patients over 21. The approval builds on the earlier launch of saypha MagIQ and expands Obagi's addressable market in the U.S. dermal filler category. The product uses Croma-Pharma's proprietary MACRO Core Technology and is planned for commercial launch.

About: Waldencast plc operates in the beauty and wellness industry in the United States, Canada, Europe, the Middle East, India, Australia, and New Zealand. The company operates through two segments, Obagi Medical and Milk Makeup. It offers skin care products to minimize signs of skin aging, address dark spots, hyperpigmentation, fine lines and wrinkles, and protect and enhance skin tone and texture; cosmetics; and other beauty products.

  • Announced: 2026-06-15

The company was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Englewood, Colorado.

item.ns0:headline: Receives FDA 510(k) clearance for MEDIFLY Maggots; first L. cuprina product
item.description:
Receives FDA 510(k) clearance for MEDIFLY Maggots; first L. cuprina product

Received FDA 510(k) clearance for MEDIFLY Maggots, the first U.S. clearance for a Lucilia cuprina maggot debridement product. The product is cleared for debridement of non-healing necrotic wounds including pressure ulcers and diabetic foot ulcers. The clearance may support regulatory pathways in other markets such as Saudi Arabia, Hong Kong, and China.

About: Cuprina Holdings (Cayman) Limited, a biomedical and biotechnology company, focuses on the development and commercialization of products for the management of chronic wounds. The company manufactures and distributes a line of medical grade sterile blowfly larvae bio-dressing products used as a biological debridement tool for chronic wounds under the MEDIFLY brand name.

item.description:
Acquires past-producing Eagle Point Tungsten Mine; expands US critical mineral portfolio

Western Star Resources acquired a 100% interest in the past-producing Eagle Point Tungsten Mine in Hidalgo County, New Mexico. The property comprises 24 lode mining claims with historical production of ~1,800 tons at ~0.5% WO3 and recent USGS sampling returning up to 27.6% WO3. The acquisition expands Western Star's portfolio of US tungsten assets in a critical mineral jurisdiction with no domestic commercial production.

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · TWO
item.ns0:headline: Engages UWMC on competing all-cash bid; CCM $12.00/sh deal pending; vote June 23
item.description:
Engages UWMC on competing all-cash bid; CCM $12.00/sh deal pending; vote June 23

Is being acquired by CrossCountry Intermediate Holdco (CCM) for $12.00 per share in cash, plus a stub dividend, with committed financing. The filing details a competing unsolicited bid from UWM Holdings (UWMC), which proposed $12.50 per share cash elect or default stock consideration (2.3328 UWMC shares, implied ~$7.77/sh based on UWMC's May 11 closing price of $3.33). The board determined the UWMC proposal was not a 'Company Superior Proposal' under the CCM agreement. On June 8, CCM granted a waiver allowing TWO to engage with UWMC on an all-cash bid. Discussions occurred June 11, but UWMC did not submit a revised all-cash proposal by the waiver's expiry on June 12. The special meeting to vote on the CCM merger has been adjourned to June 23, 2026. 41 of 53 required state and agency regulatory approvals have been obtained.

About: Two Harbors Investment Corp. invests in, finances, and manages mortgage servicing rights (MSRs), agency residential mortgage-backed securities (RMBS), and other financial assets through RoundPoint in the United States. The company target assets include agency RMBS collateralized by fixed rate mortgage loans, adjustable rate mortgage loans, hybrid mortgage loans, or derivatives; and other assets, such as financial and mortgage-related assets, comprising non-agency securities and non-hedging trans…

Acquires SVRE for $300M cash + 126.85M shares

Filed an amended preliminary proxy statement for its acquisition of SVRE Holdings Ltd., issuing 126.85M shares and paying $300M cash. The filing includes updated pro forma financials reflecting the merger and related transactions (private placement of $1.5B, DOC financing up to $1.6B). SVRE shareholders have approved; USAR stockholder vote on share issuance pending SEC review.

About: USA Rare Earth, Inc. engages in mining, processing, and supplying rare earths and other critical minerals in the United States, Europe, and Asia. It primarily explores neodymium, dysprosium, terbium, yttrium, gallium, hafnium, praseodymium, samarium, and other critical minerals. The company holds interests in the Round Top Mountain located near Sierra Blanca, Texas.

  • Counterparty: SVRE Holdings Ltd.
  • Deal value: $300M cash + 126.85M shares
  • Consideration: cash+stock
  • Announced: 2026-04-19

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · IPX
item.ns0:headline: Acquires Covia Camden critical mineral assets for $3M cash
item.description:
Acquires Covia Camden critical mineral assets for $3M cash

Entered into a definitive agreement to acquire mineral rights, pre-processed stockpiles, mining equipment, rail infrastructure, and approximately 2,800 acres of owned/leased property from Covia Solutions LLC for US$3 million. The Camden assets are adjacent to IperionX's Titan Project in Tennessee, consolidating the Big Sandy Critical Minerals Province and adding feedstock optionality. IperionX plans to advance stockpile surveys, drilling, and metallurgical test work to integrate the assets.

About: IperionX Limited engages in the development of its mineral properties in the United States. It holds a 100% interest in the critical minerals Titan project, which has resources of titanium, zircon, and rare earth mineral resources in Tennessee, the United States. The company also engages in the production of angular and spherical titanium metal powders. It serves automotive and transport, consumer electronics, aerospace and defense, energy, medical, luxury goods, and industrial markets.

  • Counterparty: Covia Solutions LLC
  • Deal value: $3,000,000
  • Consideration: cash
  • Announced: 2026-06-15

item.ns0:headline: Acquires DevvStream and Southern Energy in all-stock merger; pre-close holders own 66.7%
item.description:
Acquires DevvStream and Southern Energy in all-stock merger; pre-close holders own 66.7%

Has filed an S-4 registration statement for its proposed all-stock acquisition of DevvStream Corp. and Southern Energy Renewables Inc. Under the Business Combination Agreement dated April 13, 2026, Southern Energy will receive 35% and DevvStream 15% of pre-closing XCF Global common shares, with existing XCF holders retaining 66.7%. The transactions require approval of XCF Global stockholders (stock issuance proposal) and DevvStream shareholders (merger proposal). Special meetings are expected in mid-2026. Lock-up agreements ensure approval from XCF insiders holding a majority of voting power.

About: XCF Global, Inc. manufactures and sells renewable fuels in the United States. It develops and operates clean fuel production facilities to produce clean-burning and sustainable biofuels, sustainable aviation fuels, and renewable diesel and naphtha products; and sells environmental credits. XCF Global, Inc. was founded in 2016 and is headquartered in Houston, Texas.

  • Counterparty: DevvStream Corp. and Southern Energy Renewables Inc.

Ameris Bancorp's bank subsidiary lost a jury verdict awarding former CEO Patrick Byrne $16.525M in economic and non-economic damages plus $62.9M in punitive damages, totaling ~$79.4M. The company disputes the verdict and plans to appeal. The final resolution could materially affect results and liquidity.

item.description:
Amends merger terms with AVM and Biomed; closing extended to Dec 31, 2026

Amended its merger agreement with AVM Biotechnology and Biomed 360, extending the closing date to December 31, 2026. The amendment revises investment obligations: $1M in Tranche 1 already funded, $1.125M in Tranche 2 provided, with $500K monthly tranches through October and $375K in November convertible at $2.50/share. At closing, the merged entity must raise $50M at $5/share for uplisting to a senior exchange. All other terms remain in force.

About: AI Technology Group Inc. does not have significant operations. It seeks to merge with another entity. The company was formerly known as Energenx, Inc. and changed its name to AI Technology Group Inc. in September 2019. AI Technology Group Inc. was incorporated in 1999 and is based in Reno, Nevada.

  • Counterparty: AVM Biotechnology Inc. and Biomed 360 Solutions Corp.
  • Consideration: cash+stock
  • Announced: 2025-09-15
  • Expected Close: 2026-12-31

item.ns0:headline: Acquires Big3 three-on-three basketball league; $290M base consideration; Q4 2026 close
item.description:
Acquires Big3 three-on-three basketball league; $290M base consideration; Q4 2026 close

A SPAC, entered into a definitive business combination agreement to acquire BIG3 HoldCo LLC, the operator of a professional three-on-three basketball league. The aggregate consideration to Big3 equity holders is a number of Pubco common shares equal to $290 million plus Big3's cash position at closing, divided by a per-share price. Additionally, 2 million unvested earnout shares will be issued. The transaction is expected to close in the fourth quarter of 2026, subject to Graf shareholder approval, Big3 noteholder approval, and customary conditions.

About: Graf Global Corp., a blank check company, focuses on effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was incorporated in 2021 and is based in The Woodlands, Texas.

item.title: 🎯 Tender · GNK
item.ns0:headline: Target of $24.80 hostile tender from Diana Shipping; proxy vote June 17
item.description:
Target of $24.80 hostile tender from Diana Shipping; proxy vote June 17

Faces an unsolicited $24.80 per share cash tender offer and proxy contest from Diana Shipping inc. Genco's board urges shareholders to vote FOR its six nominees and AGAINST Diana's two proposals at the June 17 annual meeting, and not to tender shares. The board deems the offer inadequate as it is below estimated net asset value and lacks a control premium.

About: Genco Shipping & Trading Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the ocean transportation of drybulk cargoes worldwide. It operates through two segments: major bulk and minor bulk fleet. The company owns and operates dry bulk vessels to transports iron ore, grains, coal, steel products, and other drybulk cargoes. It charters its vessels primarily to trading houses, including commodities traders; producers; and government-owned entities.

  • Counterparty: Diana Shipping inc.
  • Offer price: $24.80
  • Consideration: cash

item.title: 🤝 Merger · ASBP
item.ns0:headline: Acquires automotive systems business from FireFish for ~$30.8M adjusted cash
item.description:
Acquires automotive systems business from FireFish for ~$30.8M adjusted cash

Entered a definitive purchase agreement to acquire the automotive driver control systems business from FireFish TopCo for a base purchase price of $30,000,000 plus $800,000 for deferred revenue, subject to adjustments for taxes and indebtedness. Closing is conditioned on the seller delivering a PCAOB audit with unqualified opinion showing Gross Profit minus capex of at least $12,000,000 for fiscal years 2024 and 2025. If not met by September 10, 2026 (Outside Date), Aspire may terminate; termination triggers a $3,500,000 fee from the breaching party.

item.ns0:headline: Files definitive proxy to call special meeting; seeks new board majority
item.description:
Files definitive proxy to call special meeting; seeks new board majority

Toby Neugebauer, co-founder and largest shareholder of Fermi Inc., filed definitive proxy solicitation materials to call a Special Meeting of shareholders to elect a new board majority of six independent directors. Shareholders of record as of June 10, 2026 are entitled to consent by returning a GREEN agent designation card. The activist argues the current board is entrenched and not pursuing a full-value strategic review.

About: Fermi Inc. engages in the development of private power campus for AI-centric customers in the United States. The company also develops, owns, and leases grid-independent energy generation and high-performance computing campuses; develops and operates integrated power generation and computing infrastructure. It also engages in acquisition of land, permitting, construction, and long-term leases.

  • Announced: 2026-06-11

item.ns0:headline: Sells 9.5-acre land under Ford Amphitheater to ORF for $49.7M
item.description:
Sells 9.5-acre land under Ford Amphitheater to ORF for $49.7M

Venu Holding's subsidiary sold approximately 9.5 acres of land in Colorado Springs to O'Neil Roth Ford, LLC for $49.7 million, consisting of $29.82 million cash and a $19.88 million promissory note. The sale is part of the company's sale-leaseback strategy; the land is leased back under a new ground lease with annual rent of $4.2245 million. Additionally, the company received $10 million in common stock from a shareholder in a related transaction.

About: Venu Holding Corporation, an entertainment and hospitality company, designs, develops, owns, and operates up-scale music venues, multi-season amphitheaters, and full-service restaurants and bars in the United States. The company owns and operates indoor music hall venues under the Bourbon Brothers Presents name; multi-seasonal amphitheaters under The Sunset Amphitheater name; restaurants under the Bourbon Brothers Smokehouse & Tavern, Notes Eatery, Roth’s Seafood & Chophouse, and Notes Hospitali…

item.title: ⚔️ Proxy Contest · GNK
item.ns0:headline: Faces Diana Shipping proxy fight; urges vote FOR rights agreement and directors
item.description:
Faces Diana Shipping proxy fight; urges vote FOR rights agreement and directors

Limited board made commitments on its shareholder rights agreement and urged shareholders to vote FOR continuation of the rights agreement and FOR the board's six directors, and to reject Diana Shipping Inc.'s inadequate $24.80 per share tender offer. Diana has launched a proxy fight to elect two nominees and a hostile tender offer; the board remains open to a fair offer reflecting NAV plus control premium. Voting is underway; the board will review the rights agreement annually and limit any extension to 12 months.

About: Genco Shipping & Trading Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the ocean transportation of drybulk cargoes worldwide. It operates through two segments: major bulk and minor bulk fleet. The company owns and operates dry bulk vessels to transports iron ore, grains, coal, steel products, and other drybulk cargoes. It charters its vessels primarily to trading houses, including commodities traders; producers; and government-owned entities.

  • Counterparty: Diana Shipping Inc.
  • Offer price: 24.80
  • Consideration: cash

Px $24.03 · Mkt cap $1.08B · EV $1.35B · Fwd P/E 15.9x · Fwd EV/EBITDA 7.0x · Industrials / Marine Transportation

item.ns0:headline: Acquires Freenome Holdings for $655M stock; $240M PIPE at $10/sh
item.description:
Acquires Freenome Holdings for $655M stock; $240M PIPE at $10/sh

A SPAC, is merging with Freenome Holdings, a cancer diagnostics company. Freenome stockholders will receive shares of New Freenome common stock valued at $10.00 per share, aggregating approximately $655.2 million. A concurrent PIPE financing of $240 million at $10.00 per share has been committed. The transaction requires shareholder approval and other customary conditions; the proxy statement has been filed for the extraordinary general meeting.

About: Perceptive Capital Solutions Corp does not have significant operations. The company intends to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities operating in the life sciences and medical technology sectors in North America or Europe. Perceptive Capital Solutions Corp was incorporated in 2024 and is based in New York, New York.

item.ns0:headline: Approves redomestication from Colorado to Texas
item.description:
Approves redomestication from Colorado to Texas

Shareholders approved the redomestication from Colorado to Texas by conversion at the annual meeting on June 10, 2026. The conversion will change the company's state of incorporation to Texas. Vote: 9,219,513 for, 113,692 against, 5,852 abstentions, 1,215,264 broker non-votes.

About: Natural Gas Services Group, Inc. provides natural gas compression equipment, flares and related assets; and electric compression equipment, technology, and services to the energy industry in the United States. The company rents, designs, installs, service, and maintains natural gas engine and electric motor drive compressors for oil and gas production and processing facilities. It also designs and assembles compressor units for rental; and designs, engineers, and sells compressor components.

item.title: 📉 Delisting · Forced · GOCO
item.ns0:headline: Forced Nasdaq delisting effective June 16; shares to trade OTC
item.description:
Forced Nasdaq delisting effective June 16; shares to trade OTC

Received Nasdaq notice of delisting due to Chapter 11 filing and failure to meet minimum market value requirement. Trading suspended at open on June 16; company will not appeal and expects shares to quote on OTC markets. The delisting follows a prepackaged Chapter 11 filing on June 7.

About: GoHealth, Inc. operates as a health insurance marketplace and Medicare-focused digital health company in the United States. The company offers Medicare plans, including Medicare advantage, Medicare supplement, prescription drug plans, and special needs plans. It also operates a technology platform that leverages machine-learning algorithms of insurance purchasing behavior to reimagine the process of matching a health plan for a consumer’s specific needs.

item.title: 🤝 Merger · BALY
item.ns0:headline: Subsidiary Bally's Intralot to acquire Evoke PLC for £243M; 0.537 shares or 52p cash
item.description:
Subsidiary Bally's Intralot to acquire Evoke PLC for £243M; 0.537 shares or 52p cash

Bally's Corp's majority-owned subsidiary Bally's Intralot S.A. has agreed to acquire Evoke PLC via a scheme of arrangement. Evoke shareholders will receive 0.537 new Bally's Intralot shares per Evoke share, or 52 pence in cash (capped at £117.1M). The deal values Evoke at approximately £243.1M and is expected to close between Q4 2026 and Q1 2027, subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals.

About: Bally’s Corporation is a fast-growing global entertainment brand with 19 casinos across 11 US states and one casino in Newcastle, UK, along with a golf course in New York and a horse racetrack in Colorado. Bally’s also owns Bally Bet, a first-in-class sports betting and igaming platform, licensed in 13 jurisdictions in North America. Bally’s holds a majority interest in Bally’s Intralot S.A. a leading lottery solutions supplier and igaming operator.

  • Counterparty: Evoke PLC
  • Offer price: 52p cash or 0.537 Bally's Intralot shares
  • Deal value: £243.1 million
  • Consideration: cash+stock
  • Announced: 2026-06-05
  • Expected Close: Q4 2026 - Q1 2027

item.description:
Acquires Bridgewell Agribusiness for $13.66M in convertible notes; assumes $30.35M debt

Acquired Bridgewell Agribusiness LLC for a closing purchase price of approximately $13.66 million, paid via unsecured subordinated convertible notes convertible into ~22 million subordinate voting shares at $0.62 per share. The company also assumed approximately $30.35 million in existing indebtedness. The acquisition closed on June 5, 2026, contemporaneously with the execution of the purchase agreement.

About: Vireo Growth Inc. operates as a cannabis company that cultivates, manufactures, processes, and distributes medical and adult-use cannabis products in Maryland, Minnesota, Missouri, Nevada, New York, and Utah. It sells cannabis products through a network of retail dispensaries and distributors. The company was formerly known as Goodness Growth Holdings, Inc. and changed its name to Vireo Growth Inc. in July 2024. Vireo Growth Inc.
